channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: We've got another hint that the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 is on the way
item.description: It's looking more and more likely that we'll see a Galaxy Watch 8 from Samsung in the next few months.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Everything new on Apple TV+ in April 2025: The Studio, Your Friends and Neighbors, Government Cheese, and more
item.description: There are a whole host of new shows, plus new episodes of currently running Apple TV+ series, that demand your attention in April.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: New 3D technology could soon bring surgeons closer to patients in Africa's most remote regions
item.description: A groundbreaking initiative could soon be bringing surgeons closer to patients in Africa's remote corners where the doctor-to-patients ratio is among the lowest in the world.
item.dc:creator: Naa Adorkor Cudjoe, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization
item.description: Barry Tanner, the deputy CIO for the Department of the Navy, said the initiative to reduce and eliminate duplicative applications is targeting business systems. The post How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: The Rise of Group Chats: A New Form of Social Organization
item.description: Group chats have become an integral part of modern communication, impacting society at all levels. From family and friends to politics and business, group chats have emerged organically without being a 'trend' or major innovation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This may be the most private and secure cloud-based AI solution around
item.description: What if you could build a business-specific generative AI (genAI) solution that was hosted in the cloud? What if that cloud used the most energy-efficient systems in the world? And what if those services were also all running on the world’s most secure computing platform, the Mac? Wonder no more, b
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A future Apple Watch could debut a glass frame with touch controls
item.description: A new leak and patent indicate that Apple is working on a future Apple Watch with a touchscreen glass frame.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Convicted of bilking investors, Nikola founder and Trump donor gets a presidential pardon
item.description: The founder of an electric car start-up sentenced to prison for exaggerating the potential of his technology has been pardoned by President Donald Trump, potentially wiping out hundreds of millions of dollars in restitution that prosecutors were seeking for bamboozled investors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: La Cámara de Cuentas de Andalucía moderniza su sistema de gestión financiera
item.description: La Cámara de Cuentas de Andalucía da un paso adelante en la modernización de sus sistemas de gestión económica y financiera para optimizar la operativa contable y los trámites administrativos presupuestarios.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La transformación digital, esencial para la supervivencia del sector asegurador
item.description: Los beneficios de la transformación digital ya son palpables para el sector asegurador. Así lo constata el informe Perspectivas de tecnología en seguros 2025: transformando la innovación en ventaja competitiva que firma Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Agencies prepare to be resilient through ‘multidimensional’ risks and threats
item.description: From cyber attacks to natural disasters, agency continuity planning has become more “multidimensional” than ever before. The post Agencies prepare to be resilient through ‘multidimensional’ risks and threats first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated
item.description: Integrating electronic health records, remote sensing, and artificial intelligence brings efficiency for both patients and providers. The post Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: ClickFix malware tricks you into infecting your own Windows PC
item.description: Hackers are tricking people into installing password-stealing malware by making them press keyboard shortcuts under the pretense of proving they're not bots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: News and insights
item.description: Nvidia GTC 2025 has become a landmark event, solidifying the company’s position at the forefront of the AI technology. This year the major theme was agentic AI, which represents a shift from data generation to AI systems capable of autonomous reasoning and decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google Cloud partners with mLogica to offer mainframe modernization
item.description: Google Cloud has partnered with database and mainframe modernization software provider mLogica to help enterprises modernize their mainframe applications. The partnership will see Google Cloud combine its Dual Run service with mLogica’s LIBER*M automated code refactoring platform.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Databricks’ TAO method to allow LLM training with unlabeled data
item.description: Data lakehouse provider Databricks has unveiled a new large language model (LLM) training method, TAO that will allow enterprises to train models without labeling data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft’s newest AI agents can detail how they reason
item.description: If you’re wondering how AI agents work, Microsoft’s new Copilot AI agents provide real-time answers on how data is being analyzed and sourced to reach results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Vibe coding is groovy
item.description: Vibe coding is most definitely having a moment. Don’t feel bad if you haven’t heard of it—the Wikipedia page for it just went up on March 15 of this year.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: World Backup Day is March 31
item.description: Are you ready? World Backup Day is March 31, a day that has been recognized every year since it was first set up in 2011.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World
